title: 100 Non-Repeating Glitter Christmas Stickers, Assorted Vinyl Waterproof Holographic Merry Christmas Stickers for Xmas Decorations Crafts Presents Cards Envelopes Wrapping
features: 🎅 PREMIUM DESIGN: Masper 100 unique Glitter Holographic Christmas Stickers featuring festive designs including Santa, snowmen, reindeer, ornaments, and holiday decorations
🎄WATERPROOF MATERIAL: Made from durable vinyl material with glitter accents, these stickers are waterproof and built to last through the holiday season
❄️ VERSATILE USE: Perfect for decorating Christmas cards, gift wrapping, envelopes, scrapbooks, planners, laptops, and various holiday craft projects
⛄️ PEEL AND STICK: Easy to apply and remove without leaving residue, each sticker features a strong adhesive backing for secure placement
🦌 FESTIVE VARIETY: Collection includes traditional holiday symbols, Christmas trees, stockings, gingerbread men, and seasonal greetings in vibrant colours
description: Product description Masper 100 Non-Repeating Glitter Christmas Stickers, Assorted Vinyl Waterproof Holographic Merry Christmas Stickers for Xmas Decorations Crafts Presents Cards Envelopes Wrapping Bring festive cheer to your holiday season with this delightful collection of 100 unique Christmas stickers from Masper. Each sticker features charming holographic and glitter details that catch the light beautifully, showcasing classic holiday motifs including jolly figures, cheerful snowmen, decorated Christmas trees, reindeer, stockings, ornaments, and festive greetings. These high-quality vinyl stickers are waterproof and durable, perfect for adding a magical touch to your Christmas cards, gift wrapping, envelopes, scrapbooks, and holiday craft projects. The set includes a wonderful variety of sizes and designs, ensuring you'll find the perfect sticker for every festive occasion. Whether you're decorating for a holiday party, personalising Christmas correspondence, or creating seasonal crafts, these stickers will add that special sparkle to your yuletide celebrations. The non-repeating designs mean you'll have plenty of variety to work with, making them ideal for both individual and group craft activities. Safety Warning Warning: choking risk, keep away from children under 3 years of age
